content.text:
### End of section intro

The transformer architecture has revolutionized natural language processing {{cite_1_1}}, enabling unprecedented performance on a wide range of benchmarks. Building upon these foundations, the following section presents the methodology employed in this study.

### Start of section method

The methodology draws directly from the attention mechanisms described in prior work {{cite_2_1}}, adapting them for the domain-specific requirements of academic text analysis. Each experimental condition was evaluated under controlled settings to ensure reproducibility.
